full_text:
Xu Ying (Boji)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Ying, styledBoji, was born in Zuopingyi. Once whipped Zhang Ji who later tried to promote Xu Ying. Rejected offer due to being of greater family. Xu Ying was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
